headline: The Race to Commercialize the World’s Most Powerful Psychedelic
summary: An obscure psychedelic is drawing intense interest from the pharmaceutical industry. WSJ explores why companies are betting hundreds of millions of dollars on the therapeutic potential of a toad poison.

raw.headline: The Race to Commercialize the World’s Most Powerful Psychedelic

headline: What Lilly's Peer-Beating Numbers Cost You
summary: In the world of big pharma, one company is both the star performer and the most expensive name on the marquee, forcing investors to ask if the price of admission is simply too high.

headline: HCA Stock Plummets After Slashing 2026 Guidance – Marks Fifth Straight Day Of Losses
summary: The company attributed the guidance cut to a larger-than-expected shift in payer mix and a greater financial impact from health insurance exchanges.

headline: Is AbbVie (ABBV) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in AbbVie (ABBV). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: The GLP-1s Are Creating Another Boom, a New $2 Billion Opportunity Exists in Aesthetics. Conexeu Is Building for It
summary: Conexeu Sciences is aiming CXU™ at the largest unclaimed frontier in injectable aesthetics: restoring body fullness at a scale today's fillers were never built to reach. The move builds on the company's completed 12-month P.R.O.O.F.™ preclinical studyHighlights An unclaimed opportunity. headline: Fresh off buyout, Akero execs reunite to advance long-acting psoriasis pill
summary: Set to go public via a reverse merger, Avere has licensed from a prolific Chinese drugmaker rights to a potential threat to medicines like Skyrizi and Icotyde.
